creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
ping? update ports tree? send new patch?

anon svn is available now, and you can use 'svn diff' to create patches 
with 'Index' in them.

<http://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsSubversionPrimer>

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
